reason_for_classification: This is a conference/masterclass promotional video featuring lectures, interviews, and live surgery demonstrations from a Laparoscopic Urology conference (March 5-6, 2020, Rome, Italy) organized by Richard Wolf Academy Prima Vista. The frames show: (1) Roman landmarks and conference venue aerials, (2) Masterclass Workshop title cards, (3) Dr. Pierluigi Bove introducing content with narration and graphics overlays, (4) Conference facility tours and hands-on lab sessions with multiple attendees, (5) Live surgery broadcasts with surgeons operating, (6) Interview segments, and (7) Promotional messaging for registration. There is no FLS task being performed by a trainee or expert demonstrator.
confidence_rationale: Definitively instructional/promotional content. No Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture task visible. No isolated FLS trainer box, no marked gauze, no rubber pegs, no Penrose drain for suturing. Content is educational conference material, not a scoreable FLS performance.

teaching_content.event_context: Laparoscopic Urology Masterclass and Live Surgery Workshop, March 5-6, 2020, San Carlo di Nancy Hospital, Rome, Italy
teaching_content.instructor: Dr. Pierluigi Bove, MD (University of Rome Tor Vergata, Chief of Urology Department)
teaching_content.content_type: Conference lectures, hands-on wet-lab training, and live surgical broadcasts
teaching_content.demonstrated_focus: Laparoscopic surgical techniques and urology procedures
